findings.title: Command injection via Runtime.exec in ping endpoint
findings.description: User-supplied host parameter concatenated directly into Runtime.exec() shell command without sanitization

findings.title: Command injection via shell execution in DNS lookup helper
findings.description: Domain parameter passed through private helper into Runtime.exec with /bin/sh -c and string concatenation

findings.title: Multi-parameter command injection in log search shell pipeline
findings.description: Three user-controlled parameters interpolated into tail|grep shell pipeline via String.format with insufficient quoting

findings.title: Command injection via shell execution in archive endpoint
findings.description: FilePath from request body embedded into tar command via String.format and ProcessBuilder with shell execution

findings.title: Command injection via shell execution in port check
findings.description: Host parameter from request body embedded into nc command via String.format and ProcessBuilder with shell execution

findings.title: Command injection via complex shell pipeline in certificate check
findings.description: Hostname parameter interpolated three times into complex openssl shell pipeline with redirections
